worldData.instructions:
A / D — helm · W / S — sheet in / ease the sail · SPACE — let fly (dump power)

Three pearls sleep in the sea. Gather all three and bring them home to the lighthouse dock (just south of the light) — arrive slow, sails eased. Every pearl aboard makes her heavier on the helm. The compass bottom-left is your wind: keep the arrow out of the red no-go cone, fill the bottom arc for power — and when the left heel bar flashes, ease the sheet or you broach and a pearl spills where it falls. Rocks and the maelstrom eat hull; three hits and the sea reclaims everything. Fastest homecoming is the record.
